reviews.review_description:
It's a 3D match-3-style color matching game.
Turn head to rotate the puzzle and pull trigger to place a color cube.

It's fun to manipulate the puzzle by turning head.
It's time sensitive style, so you have to harry later on.
3,4,5 colors for 4 different object shapes such as a cube, a pyramid.
 
Each object shape got 1 to 9 levels. 
The higher the level goes up, the busier and tougher it gets.
You can choose any level you want.
Also you can adjust turning speed and volumes of sound and music in setting.

Puzzle with 3 colors is easier that there's same color connected a lot.
But I can't beat level 6. 
If I'm lucky enough to get easy combination of color, maybe I can survive longer.

Anyways, it's fun and costs only a dollar, so why don't you try?

By the way, I'm a Japanese in Japan.  
So don't pay too much attention to my English please.
Very reasonable priced addictive game,thought would try it out after download and ended up playing it for ages very very addictive!!!
